title: 4-Node Motif Census on Full 174-Graph Corpus with 24D Capability Clustering
summary: Demo notebook performing 4-node directed motif census on 16 LLM attribution graphs (gemma-2-2b, 8 capability domains) from Neuronpedia. Computes 3-node and 4-node motif census using igraph, generates degree-preserving DAG null models via edge swaps, computes Z-scores and significance profiles. Compares spectral clustering NMI across 6 feature sets (4-node SP, count ratios, Z-scores, 3-node enriched, graph stats, random). Finds 5/24 motif types universally overrepresented and confirms capability clustering (NMI=0.866). Uses 16 pre-pruned graphs (1MB mini dataset) and runs in ~4 minutes.
